1x1.description: An elbow-shaped cable connecting the left and bottom edges.

1x2.description: A tee-shaped cable connects to the left, right, and bottom edges.

1x3.description: A straight horizontal cable connects the left and right edges.

2x1.description: A straight cable runs vertically, connecting the top and bottom edges.

2x2.description: A tee-shaped cable connects to the top, bottom, and right edges.

2x3.description: A T-shaped cable exits left, right, and bottom edges.

3x1.description: A tee-shaped cable exits top, left, and right edges.

3x2.description: An elbow-shaped cable connecting the left and top edges.

3x3.description: An elbow-shaped cable connecting the top and right edges.
